hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "git commit"; then bash ./scripts/workflow-gate.sh pre-commit && bash ./scripts/workflow-gate.sh amaw-pre-commit; fi'
hooks.description: Block git commit if VERIFY/POST-REVIEW/SESSION not done; also call check_guardrails when AMAW mode active (no-op default v2.2). Timeout 75s to accommodate cold-start ContextHub embedding ops.

AMAW risky-action guardrail gate. Cheap local pre-check on every Bash call; for git push / force-push / rm -r / git reset --hard / destructive docker / migrations it consults ContextHub check_guardrails and surfaces a permission 'ask' so the action needs explicit user approval. Fail-open: ContextHub unavailable -> allow.

AMAW ContextHub steering. At session start, injects the active guardrail set + recent captured lessons into context (Kiro-style steering — rules in front of the agent, not search-on-demand). Fail-open: ContextHub unavailable -> injects nothing.
